Values are quantized to the selected Scale/Root and sent as absolute MIDI notes.

Settings are synced live if device is connected. Use "Generate UF2" to embed them in firmware.

Step 1: Load Base Firmware (Optional)

Drop flux.uf2 here or click to browse
Firmware will be merged with samples into one file

Step 2: Add Samples

Drop audio files here or click to browse
MP3, WAV, AIFF, OGG supported. Auto-resampled to 22.05kHz Mu-Law.
